payload.answer: I found a conflict: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify whether this is a correction, a different Sara, or both relationships apply in some specific context.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to Sara with a conflicting family relationship relative to the existing memory; it is unclear whether this is the same Sara, a correction, or an additional person.

details: No durable memory was committed because the relationship conflicts with an existing memory.

repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Store both only if they refer to different people named Sara.
Add context explaining how Sara is both your daughter and niece, if applicable.
